key_drivers: Rising real yields (+13bps to 2.01% on Mar 20) are the primary headwind for gold and equities, particularly NQ which carries a 2x real yield weight
Geopolitical risk premium from US-Iran conflict supports CL (supply disruption) and safe-haven flows into JPY and gold; WTI near $98/bbl with elevated implied volatility
Central bank divergence driving FX: ECB hawkish hold (3 hikes priced for 2026), BoJ hawkish cycle (0.75%, more hikes expected), and RBA hike to 4.10% reshaping rate differentials against USD
